details.test: Task 1: Book 2-hour superhero party for 12 kids under $350 next Saturday
Task 3: Create custom party with 3 add-ons under $80 and total under $400
Task 4: Find entertainer with no travel fee in 94110 and send inquiry
Task 5: Book top-rated entertainer for 90-minute party at 11:00 AM
Task 6: Start booking after reading deposit policy FAQ
Task 7: Schedule two parties on same day at 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM
Task 8: Apply WEEKDAY15 promo to 90-minute weekday package for up to 15 kids
Task 9: Purchase $150 digital gift card and add to cart
